name: Ryan Highly
title: Owner & Founder
quote: I had the pleasure of facilitating two mission trip teams led by Tory over the last two years. From the preparation of the trip to the spiritual and logistical leadership of Tory on the trip, I truly saw his care, professionalism and guidance on full display. He was prepared, consistent but also able to show the flexibility that is often needed on short-term mission trips; and I believe it was because of his ability to keep purpose and discipleship at the forefront. He is a high-level leader.
